title: Greenfield Next.js App Router + TypeScript scaffold
description: Create projects/todo-reference with Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, and the folder layout from the architecture brief: src/domain, src/application, src/infrastructure, src/app, src/components, src/styles; path aliases in tsconfig; ESLint/Prettier (or repo-equivalent) baseline; package manager aligned with repo root. No feature todo logic beyond placeholders if needed for build.
acceptance: projects/todo-reference builds with next build (or documented dev build) using App Router under src/app.

Directory skeleton exists: src/domain, src/application, src/infrastructure, src/app, src/components (ui/atoms|molecules|organisms per brief intent), src/styles with tokens entry (e.g. tokens.css) wired from root layout.

TypeScript strict project references are explicit; no application/domain/infrastructure code imports react, next/*, or sqlite from domain/ or application/ layers (enforced by structure and lint rules where applicable).
README or package.json scripts document install, dev, and build from projects/todo-reference.
Singleton policy from brief is documented for implementers (no mutable global DB handles; factories per request/test).
